title: Pan-Seared Squid with Garlic and Herbs
description: A quick and flavorful seafood dish that's perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of pan-seared squid, garlic, and herbs creates a delicious and aromatic meal.

ingredients.name: Squid
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen, thawed and patted dry

instructions: Season the squid with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the torrified breadcrumbs and cook for 1 minute.
Add the squid to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side until cooked through.
Serve immediately and garnish with parsley if desired.
